_comment: Aggregator for Ryazhenka Updater download tabs. All URLs use the GitHub releases/latest/download/<filename> alias so the JSON does not need to be re-edited on every upstream release. Asset filename must be stable across releases.

firmwares._TODO: Add stable mirror URL for Nintendo firmware archives once chosen by maintainer.

custom._TODO: Populate with Ryazhenka-specific homebrew bundles once asset filenames are confirmed (Sys-clk, Ryazhahand-Overlay, FPSLocker, EdiZon, Fizeau, ovlSysmodules, Mission-Control, Ryazha-Status-Monitor, Ryazhenkabestcfw-Tuner).
